case_title: DEBRA BATCHIE VS. BMT PROMOTIONS AND TALENT LLC

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BATCHIE, DEBRA AS TO DEFENDANT BMT PROMOTIONS AND TALENT LLC A GEORGIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
